name: Compagnie des Eaux de Royan
summary: Compagnie des Eaux de Royan engages in the distribution of drinkable water and related services in France. It also offers waste water sanitation and piping installation services. The company is based in Vaux-sur-Mer, France. Compagnie des Eaux de Royan operates as a subsidiary of Societe D'amenagement Urbain Et Rural.
